answers: Incident management = process for detecting, responding to, and resolving service disruptions quickly and effectively.
Process: detect → acknowledge → investigate → mitigate → resolve → post-mortem. Communication throughout is critical.
On-call tips: have runbooks, escalation paths, clear communication channels, and blameless post-mortems after incidents.
Post-mortem: what happened, what was the impact, how was it detected, root cause, actions to prevent recurrence.
